title: Add kneighbors() and radius_neighbors() methods to supervised neighbors estimators
description:
sklearn's NeighborsBase provides kneighbors(X, n_neighbors, return_distance) and radius_neighbors(X, radius, return_distance, sort_results) on EVERY KNN/Radius estimator (classifier, regressor, AND the unsupervised NearestNeighbors).

ferrolearn currently exposes them only on FittedNearestNeighbors. Mirror them onto:
- FittedKNeighborsClassifier.kneighbors
- FittedKNeighborsRegressor.kneighbors
- FittedRadiusNeighborsClassifier.radius_neighbors
- FittedRadiusNeighborsRegressor.radius_neighbors

Reuse the existing find_neighbors helper from knn.rs so we do not duplicate the spatial-index dispatch logic.
